title: CaseId
description: 256-bit random identifier used for in-app player reports. Generated locally via `crypto.getRandomValues(new Uint8Array(32))` and rendered as 64 lowercase hex characters. **Never derived from `playerName`, IP, or any other PII.** Players hand the case id to the maintainer; the maintainer uses it as a key into the `security` log channel via the `caseId` field on `LogRecord`. Cross-link: `docs/architecture/trust-boundaries.md` § 5, plan 19 (chat safety).
